Software for understanding systems.

Simulation, infrastructure, and numerical methods. Building production systems at NAV IT.

Oslo, Norway

Oxidize

Real-time voxel rendering as a performance study.

Chunked world representation with dynamic meshing.

Mesh generation pipeline optimized for real-time updates.

Performance profiling under varying world sizes.

Propagator

Composable state propagation for physical systems.

RK4 numerical integration with adaptive stepping.

Composable force pipeline — gravity, drag, thrust.

Environment and reference frame modeling.
Foundry Self-hosted deployment, end to end. N-Body Long-term stability in gravitational simulation. Neural-Nets Neural networks from first principles. Deadreckon Guidance systems under uncertainty.

All services run on a single Mac Mini M4 — deployed through Foundry, exposed through Cloudflare Tunnels.

Software Developer
NAV IT · 2024–Present

Production systems with strict requirements for correctness, accessibility, and long-term maintainability.

Software Development Intern
Visma, Intility, Glasspaper · 2023–2024

Data analysis, cloud infrastructure, and internal tooling across short-term placements.

Programming Instructor
Oslo Kommune

Teaching programming to children through hands-on projects.

Fyrstikkalleen VGS
Information Technology and Media Production · 2022–2024
